channel.title: Software on Xing Lin
channel.description: Recent content in Software on Xing Lin

item.title: Software
item.description: logKV: a simple log-structure key/value store mtar: Migratory Tar, improving data deduplication for tar files by separating metadata blocks from data blocks. SSDSim: DiskSim 4.0 developed by CMU, with Microsoft SSD-add-on patch applied for you. Hit the Road (link) An iOS app for tracking outdoor exercises.
